business_question: Which products experienced the highest number of stockout events?
business_context: Inventory planners need to identify products frequently unavailable for customers.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    p.PRODUCT_NAME,
    COUNT(se.STOCKOUT_KEY) AS STOCKOUT_COUNT,
    SUM(se.LOST_UNITS_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_UNITS
FROM FACT_STOCKOUT_EVENT se
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
    ON se.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY p.PRODUCT_NAME
ORDER BY LOST_UNITS DESC;
